untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'announced events that contradict baseline expectations' — a fundamental event/news signal that cannot be expressed through price/volume/technical indicators alone. The deviation thresholds (1.5σ from 20-day mean, volume >150%) are translatable, but the event-driven anomaly detection component requires external event data feeds not available in the technical indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated quantifiable components: (1) Price deviation beyond 1.5σ using price_pos_20 threshold of ±1.5; (2) Volume deviation >150% using vol_ratio_20 > 2.5 (20-day avg baseline = 1.0); (3) Position size reduction on anomaly (75%) would be handled at execution layer. Entry/exit conditions assume resumption of normal regime after analysis window. The 'announced event' condition is untranslatable without news/sentiment feeds. Recommend integrating external event classifier or news sentiment indicator for complete signal implementation.
